content.speakerText: Good morning! Could you help me find the remote-controlled cars?
content.speakerTextCn: 早上好！你能帮我找找遥控汽车吗？
expectedAnswers: Of course! They're in aisle 4, near the racing track.
Sure thing—right next to the battery station.
I'll take you there. They're on the right side of the store.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否准确引导顾客到目标商品位置
语言准确性：使用了恰当的方向词和礼貌表达（'Of course', 'I'll take you'）
表达自然度：语调友好，符合家长与店员的日常互动场景

content.scenarioHint: 家长走进玩具店，想礼貌地询问儿童积木区的位置
content.speakerText: Hi, could you help me find the building blocks section?
content.speakerTextCn: 您好，您能帮我找一下积木区吗？
expectedAnswers: Of course! It's on the left side, next to the soft toys.
You'll find it in aisle 2, right after the puzzles.
Just ahead, past the stuffed animals — you can't miss it!
Sure thing! The blocks are near the back wall, by the windows.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确询问了积木区的位置
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否使用了地道的口语表达方式
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'building blocks', 'aisle', 'next to', 'near' 等场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 家长想为幼儿挑选适合3岁孩子的玩具，礼貌询问店员是否有适合低龄儿童的推荐
content.speakerText: Hi, do you have any toys recommended for a 3-year-old?
content.speakerTextCn: 您好，有没有推荐给3岁孩子的玩具？
expectedAnswers: Yes! Our sensory toys and large-piece puzzles are perfect for that age.
Absolutely — check out the wooden shape sorters and soft books over there.
We have a 'Toddler Favorites' section right by the entrance.
I’d suggest the stackable rings or musical activity cube — very popular with little ones.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确询问了适合3岁儿童的玩具推荐
语言准确性：使用了正确的年龄表达和推荐句式
表达自然度：是否使用了符合亲子购物场景的礼貌、温和语气
关键词覆盖：是否包含 '3-year-old', 'recommended', 'toys', 'sensory', 'Toddler Favorites' 等关键词
